Working Title Production Engineer

Department University Television-0912

Description Of Work

Under limited supervision, the Production Engineer works on Nebraska Public Media’s remote and studio broadcasts. The Production Engineer works closely with others to help achieve the desired “look” of the studio broadcast cameras in terms of color/tone, iris/brightness, and camera matching. Fox Sports
